name: IRC_CAND_EMAIL_ATTACHMENTS
description: This table stores the information about email attachements that are sent and received in the context of an interaction on the Submission, Candidate Pool and Candidate General Profile.

columns.Name: CAND_EMAIL_ATTACHMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for the IRC_CAND_EMAIL_ATTACHMENTS table.

columns.Name: CAND_EMAIL_MESSAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key into the IRC_CAND_EMAIL_MESSAGES table. There can be multiple attachments associated to an email message. Each attachment could be either inline or file attachment.

columns.Name: FILE_NAME
columns.Comments: Attachment file name part of email

columns.Name: CONTENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Attachment file content type using MIME type

columns.Name: FILE_SIZE
columns.Comments: Attachment file size in bytes in the email

columns.Name: INLINE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to indicate whether the attachment is inline.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the attachment whether its uploaded successfully in UCM or errored out

columns.Name: ERROR_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: Error message when uploading the attachment.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
